text.title: CSS-in-JS Examples
text.summary: styled-components Button with variants, theme setup with TypeScript augmentation, and Emotion css prop.

example.note: $variant and $size use $ prefix (transient). Component defined at module scope.
The styled.d.ts augmentation is mandatory. Without it, theme properties are typed as any and typos are undetected.
@jsxImportSource pragma enables the css prop without Babel config. Emotion reads theme from ThemeContext via useTheme.

text.reference: Detects RSC/RN/Vite context and recommends or rejects CSS-in-JS lib
